Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS 361-363 ELSIE STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION,, ERIC CHOLANKERIL and JOY FORSYTHE'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement.

Plaintiff's Motion for Determination of Good Faith Settlement is granted. The Court finds that the settlement terms described in the Motion for Determination of Good Faith Settlement were made in good faith between the parties within the meaning of Code of Civil Procedure Section 877.6.

Order is signed.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/SRB)
